nasb.text: So they made a covenant at Beersheba; and Abimelech and Phicol, the commander of his army, arose and returned to the land of the Philistines.

esv.text: So they made a covenant at Beersheba. Then Abimelech and Phicol the commander of his army rose up and returned to the land of the Philistines.

cnv.text: 他們在別是巴立約以後，亞比米勒和他的軍長非各，就起程回非利士地去了。

ccb.text: 他们立约以后，亚比米勒和他的将领非各便回非利士去了。

csbs.text: 这样他们在比尔-谢巴立了约，然后亚比米勒和他军队的首领非革就起身，回到非利士人之地。
